decks.notes: This UW control deck focuses on utilizing powerful planeswalkers like Narset, Teferi, and Phlage, along with counter spells and board wipes, to control the game and limit the opponent's options. The deck also includes cards like Orim's Chant and Solitude to protect itself and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of cantrips like Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive allows the deck to dig for key cards and maintain card advantage. Overall, the key strategy of this deck is to control the board, protect its threats, and outvalue the opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using cards like Talisman of Impulse and Eldrazi Temple to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker. It also includes control elements like Kozilek's Return and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures while maintaining control over the board through a combination of ramp and removal spells. It also includes cards like Sowing Mycospawn and Utopia Sprawl to accelerate mana production even further.

The deck focuses on using a variety of control elements and powerful creatures to slowly take over the game and out-value the opponent. It utilizes a mixture of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage engines to control the board and protect its own threats. The deck also includes a few powerful finishers to close out the game once it has established control. By carefully managing resources and playing reactively, the deck aims to grind out wins through incremental advantage and overwhelming the opponent with its powerful cards.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build a board presence with aggressive creatures and use burn spells to control the game. The deck utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to apply pressure, while using Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to deal direct damage to the opponent's creatures or life total. Additionally, cards like Thraben Charm and Ocelot Pride provide additional combat tricks and ways to enhance the aggression of the deck. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient threats and burn spells.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with blink effects to maintain board presence and disrupt opponent's strategy. By utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Prismatic Ending for removal, along with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd for pressure, the deck can quickly overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of blink spells like Ephemerate allows for the reuse of powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Casey Jones, Vigilante, providing versatility and surprising the opponent with unexpected interactions.

This Boros Aggro deck is focused on quickly overwhelming opponents with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. Utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, along with powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, the deck aims to deal damage swiftly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge adds versatility and reach to the deck, allowing for different angles of attack. With a strong mana base and a mix of threats and removal, this deck looks to apply pressure early and close out the game before opponents can stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. By utilizing cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge, the deck is able to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to provide additional support and create a winning board state. Overall, the deck excels at applying pressure early in the game and maintaining that pressure to secure victory.

The main concept of this Ruby Storm deck is to use cards like Ruby Medallion and Pyretic Ritual to generate enough mana to cast spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot to deal damage to the opponent quickly. The deck also utilizes cards like Past in Flames and Wish to recur key spells and find specific cards when needed. The goal is to chain together spells and rituals to create a powerful storm turn, overwhelming the opponent with a flurry of spells and burning them out before they can respond effectively.

The deck focuses on utilizing land ramp and untap effects to quickly assemble the pieces for the powerful Amulet Titan combo, which involves generating a large amount of mana and playing Primeval Titan to search for lands like Vesuva and bounce lands to create additional land drops. The deck also includes cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Summoner's Pact to search for key pieces, while utilizing lands like Urza's Saga and Lotus Field for additional value. Win conditions include attacking with Primeval Titan or setting up a lethal Scapeshift.

The main concept of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly using cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breakers. The deck also features control elements such as Ugin, the Eye of the Storms and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Karn, the Great Creator provides additional utility with his abilities, while Kozilek's Command and Kozilek's Return offer efficient removal options. Overall, the deck aims to overpower the opponent with massive threats while controlling the game tempo.

The key strategy of this Boros Aggro deck is to aggressively control the board and apply pressure on the opponent's life total using efficient creatures like Guide of Souls, Ragavan, and Phlage, as well as burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also takes advantage of disruptive elements like Blood Moon and Thraben Charm to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck includes powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, and Seasoned Pyromancer to provide additional threats and card advantage. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly and close out the game before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on using cards like Generous Ent and Shardless Agent to cascade into Living End, a powerful combo spell that allows the player to bring all creatures from their graveyard into play. By cycling through cards like Street Wraith and utilizing cards like Force of Negation to protect their combo, the player aims to quickly overwhelm their opponent with a board full of creatures. The deck also includes cards like Endurance to disrupt their opponent's strategy and maintain control of the battlefield. Overall, the strategy of the deck is to efficiently assemble the Living End combo and win the game through sheer creature advantage.

The key idea of this deck is to use the Broodscale Bloodchief combo to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief, along with support from Ancient Stirrings and Eldrazi Temple, the deck aims to quickly ramp up and drop Emrakul, the Promised End for a game-winning play. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and other artifact support cards further enhances the deck's strategy, while cards like Warping Wail and Malevolent Rumble provide disruption and protection. Overall, the deck focuses on assembling its combo pieces efficiently to dominate the game.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly deploy artifacts onto the battlefield to generate advantage and overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats. The deck utilizes a combination of cheap artifacts, artifact creatures, and disruptive spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. By efficiently managing resources and leveraging synergy between artifacts, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in a fast-paced and aggressive manner, ultimately securing victory through a combination of early aggression and card advantage.

This deck focuses on playing aggressively with a mix of creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes powerful cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, Leyline of the Guildpact, Lightning Bolt, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to deal damage efficiently. The inclusion of Leyline Binding and Stubborn Denial helps to disrupt the opponent's strategy while Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional control. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, with a variety of fetch lands and shock lands. Lastly, cards like Consign to Memory and Arena of Glory provide additional utility and support.

This deck utilizes a combination of aggressive creatures and blink effects to control the board and pressure the opponent. By utilizing cards like Fatal Push, Thoughtseize, and Solitude to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while also using cards like Ephemerate and Teferi, Time Raveler to protect your own creatures and generate value through blinking, this deck aims to outpace and overwhelm the opponent with a mix of threats and disruption. The deck's main focus is on quickly establishing a board presence and maintaining control through a combination of aggression and trickery.
